title: Prefix Sum
analogy: Prefix sum is like a running total on a receipt — to find how much you spent between items 3 and 7, just subtract the total at item 2 from the total at item 7.

overview.summary: Prefix sums precompute cumulative totals so any range sum can be answered in O(1) time after O(N) preprocessing.
learningObjectives: Build a prefix sum array from an input array.
Answer range sum queries in O(1).
Extend to 2D prefix sums for matrix region queries.
overview.interviewRelevance: Prefix sums are a foundational technique that appears in subarray sum problems and as a building block for more complex algorithms.

paragraphs: Financial dashboards compute running totals so 'revenue from Q2 to Q4' is just one subtraction.
Image processing uses 2D prefix sums (integral images) to compute average brightness of any rectangle in O(1).
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: Once you build the prefix sum array, any range sum is just prefix[right+1] - prefix[left] — no loop needed.

definition.technicalDefinition: A prefix sum array P is defined as P[0] = 0, P[i] = P[i-1] + A[i-1]. The sum of A[l..r] equals P[r+1] - P[l].

vocabulary.definition: P[i] = sum of A[0..i-1]. Enables O(1) range sum queries.
Computing the sum of a contiguous subarray A[l..r].
One-time O(N) work to build the prefix array before queries.

keyProperties: Build time: O(N). Query time: O(1).
Space: O(N) for the prefix array.
Extends to 2D for matrix region sums.

operations.name: Build Prefix Sum
operations.description: Create an array where each element is the cumulative sum of all prior elements.
operations.visualNote: Values accumulate left to right, each cell showing the running total.

practice.title: Subarray Sum Equals K
practice.keyInsight: prefix[j] - prefix[i] = K → use a hash map to count prefix sums.

practice.title: Range Sum Query - Immutable
practice.keyInsight: Classic prefix sum application: precompute and answer in O(1).

practice.title: Product of Array Except Self
practice.keyInsight: Prefix and suffix products instead of sums.

practice.title: Contiguous Array
practice.keyInsight: Convert 0s to -1s, then find longest subarray with sum 0 using prefix sums.

practice.title: Find Pivot Index
practice.keyInsight: Left sum = total sum - left sum - nums[i] at pivot.

conceptQuiz.question: After building a prefix sum array, what is the time to compute sum(arr[l..r])?
conceptQuiz.explanation: Range sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l], which is one subtraction.

recognitionQuiz.problemStatement: Given an array, answer 10,000 queries of the form 'what is the sum of elements from index l to r?'
recognitionQuiz.explanation: Multiple range sum queries on a static array is the textbook prefix sum use case.
